templates.title: Round on the House
templates.template: 🍻 The bar is hosting! (I wish). All players must choose someone to drink 2 sips.
templates.endTemplate: The round on the house is over.

templates.title: Happy Hour
templates.template: 🍹 It's Happy Hour! All distributed drinks are worth double (x2).
templates.endTemplate: Happy Hour is over. Normal prices again.

templates.title: Music Too Loud
templates.template: 📢 Can't hear anything! You can only speak by shouting. Anyone speaking normally drinks {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: The music has been turned down. You can talk normally now.

templates.title: The Bartender is Watching
templates.template: 👨‍🍳 Watch the 'Bartender' (the game host). If they catch you looking at your phone, drink {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: The Bartender has gone to the kitchen.

templates.title: No Leaning
templates.template: 🚫 The bar is sticky! No one can lean their elbows on the table. Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: You can lean your elbows again.

templates.title: Bar Closing
templates.template: 🕒 Last call! All drinks are worth triple (x3) to finish up quickly.
templates.endTemplate: The bar has closed. Oh wait, we're still going.

templates.title: Classy Mode
templates.template: 🍷 We're in a luxury bar. Before drinking, you must make a sophisticated toast. Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Bar Fight
templates.template: 🥊 Duel! Every time someone drinks, they must challenge another player to 'Rock, Paper, Scissors'. The loser drinks {PUNISHMENT} extra sips.
templates.endTemplate: The fight is over. Everyone friends again.

templates.title: No Real Names
templates.template: 🏷️ You're with strangers. You must call everyone by an invented nickname. Using a real name = {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: You all know each other now.

templates.title: Warm Beer
templates.template: 🍺 How gross! Those drinking beer (or similar) drink double for not complaining.

templates.title: Crazy Jukebox
templates.template: 📻 You have to hum a famous song before speaking. If no one guesses it, drink {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: The Big Guy in the Bar
templates.template: 🕺 The heaviest player (or largest) decides who drinks every time the game says 'PLAYER'.
templates.endTemplate: The power of the Big Guy has ended.

templates.title: No Pointing
templates.template: ☝️ It's rude to point in public. Anyone pointing with their finger drinks {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Friend's Day
templates.template: 🫂 For every sip you drink, a friend of your choice must drink another. Solidarity!

templates.title: Foreign Accent
templates.template: 🌍 You're a tourist in this bar. You must speak with an accent from another country. Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: The Bathroom is Busy
templates.template: 🚽 No one can go to the bathroom for the duration of this event. Anyone who can't hold it drinks {PUNISHMENT} punishment sips.

templates.title: Left Hand Only
templates.template: ✋ You can only use your left hand to touch your glass. Using the right = {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: You can use both hands again.

templates.title: Shot Night
templates.template: 🥃 All individual drinks turn into 'imaginary shots' (drink double).

templates.title: No Dirty Words
templates.template: 🤐 This is a family bar (not really). No swearing. Each swear word = {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: The Shy Waiter
templates.template: 😶 You can only communicate via gestures, no talking. Anyone who speaks drinks {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Mandatory Tip
templates.template: 💸 Every time you give out drinks, you must drink 1 yourself as a 'tip' for the service.

templates.title: Non-Alcoholic Alcohol
templates.template: 🥤 Anyone drinking something non-alcoholic drinks triple (or invites 3 sips if they don't want to drink).

templates.title: Finger Up
templates.template: ☝️ The last one to put their finger on the table when the Bartender does, drinks {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Bar Tab
templates.template: 🧾 At the end of this event, the one who drank the least must drink the sum of the drinks of the two who drank the most.

templates.title: Karaoke Mode
templates.template: 🎤 Everything you say must be sung. Speaking normally = {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Ice down the Back
templates.template: 🧊 If you fail a challenge, someone can choose to put an imaginary ice cube (drink {PUNISHMENT} extra sips) or a real one on you.

templates.title: Ladies/Gents Night
templates.template: 💃 Men drink double; 🕺 Women drink double (The Bartender chooses gender at random each turn).

templates.title: Bar Security
templates.template: 👮 No one can leave their seat. Anyone who gets up drinks {PUNISHMENT} sips and sits back down.

templates.title: Crazy Mix
templates.template: 🧪 If you drink, you must mix a bit of another drink into your glass (if possible/safe) or drink double.

templates.title: The Last Mohican
templates.template: 🏹 The last one to finish their actual drink before this event ends invites a general round of 3 sips.
